Idaho Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

9 senior living communities in Idaho — pick a city on the map, or browse the list. Hover or tap a community to see where it is.

What's available in Idaho

  • Assisted Living — 6 communities
  • Memory Care — 6 communities
  • Independent Living — 4 communities
  • Respite Care — 3 communities
  • Skilled Nursing — 2 communities

How Idaho regulates senior care

Residential assisted living facilities are licensed by the Bureau of Facility Standards; very small settings operate as Certified Family Homes.

Small homes: Certified Family Homes care for up to 4 residents in a caregiver's home — how to evaluate one.

Idaho resources for families

  • Idaho Department of Health and Welfare, Bureau of Facility Standards — license & inspection lookup (how to read reports)
  • Eldercare Locator — 1-800-677-1116 — free federal referral line to local aging services
  • Your local Area Agency on Aging — options counseling and help paying for care
  • Long-Term Care Ombudsman — resident advocates who know each facility's complaint history

New to this?

Start with how to choose a facility, levels of care, and what it really costs.

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11.
